home.title: Operator console
home.intro: Real-time view of every booking, every override, every grant. Each card below opens a workspace.

bookings.title: Bookings queue
bookings.subtitle: Every active booking, sortable and filterable. Use bulk actions for reassign or escalate.
bookings.empty: No bookings match the current filters.

capacity.title: Capacity heat map
capacity.subtitle: Per service centre, 24 hour x 7 day utilisation grid.

routing.title: Technician routing
routing.subtitle: Active routes and the GMPRO solver controls.

slots.title: Slot editor
slots.subtitle: Define slots per service centre. Schema: scId, dayOfWeek, start, end, capacity, mode.

fairness.title: Fairness monitor
fairness.subtitle: Allocation symmetry across service centres and time windows. No protected attributes are used.

safetyOverrides.title: Safety overrides log
safetyOverrides.subtitle: Every safety override, by user, agent, or operator. Click to expand context.

pricing.title: Pricing editor
pricing.subtitle: Versioned pricing per service centre. Each save creates a new version.

sla.title: SLA manager
sla.subtitle: Per service centre SLA targets and live burn down.

audit.title: Audit viewer
audit.subtitle: Command grant chains and authority log Merkle proofs. Verify cryptographically in your browser.
audit.search: Search by grantId, vehicle, or user
audit.rootsSubtitle: Every published authority log root, ordered by index. Click a root to verify a grant inclusion.

demo.banner: Demo mode — IAP is simulated; no real customer data is shown.
